name: Turkey Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds ground turkey (2 parts dark meat to 1 part white meat)
recipeInstructions:
1. For this sausage, the turkey should be 2 parts dark meat to 1 part white meat. Ground turkey from the supermarket works well in this recipe.
2. Combine brandy, thyme cloves, onion, pepper and salt in a small saucepan and place over medium heat. Cook for 3 minutes.
3. Scrape into the bowl of a food processor and add the bacon. Puree until smooth.
4. Add the mixture to a mixing bowl, then add the ground turkey and egg whites and mix well.
5. Stuff the mixture into casings or form into patties. Grill or cook sausages and serve immediately.
